notes: Curated first-pass radio catalog. External streams are playable when BASS streaming is available; tests must never fetch these URLs.

stations.name: AFN Global Gravity
stations.source: Radio Browser checked AFN 360 Global Gravity entry
stations.notes: StreamTheWorld geo-blocks the AFN 360 Global mounts outside overseas military regions: US IPs get HTTP 403 on every URL form (direct SC, redirect API, HLS) during the 2026-07-13 smoke with BASSHLS loaded. Base AFN stations are not blocked. Keep unsupported unless AFN opens access.
